description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular, boxy form with a rich, dark wood grain finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front face is divided into two sections, with a visible horizontal line indicating a drawer and an open shelf beneath the top surface. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing lamps, books, or decorative items. The drawer appears handleless, contributing to the sleek, contemporary look, and the open shelf provides additional storage or display space. The base is solid and flush with the ground, with no visible legs, giving the piece a grounded, sturdy appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, carvings, or hardware, emphasizing its functional and understated style.
description: A modern, rectangular nightstand with a dark wood finish, featuring a handleless drawer and an open shelf beneath a flat top. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with no visible legs or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the nightstand, with the open shelf and drawer visible beneath the top surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat top, the handleless drawer, and the open shelf below, with the clean, uninterrupted wood grain.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the depth and the open shelf beneath the top surface.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the open shelf and the solid, continuous wood grain across the back, with no visible hardware or openings.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
